name: Supreme Cheese Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 Quart Chef-Mate Monterey Jack and Cheddar Cheese Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the garlic, onion, and mushrooms in butter.
2. Combine vegetables, cheese sauce, white wine, and parsley. Heat to serving temperature.
3. Place on warm steam table for holding.
Makes 16 servings of 2 ounces each.
